title: Coordinates Information
description: Mod that displays coordinates in the other dimensions.
body:
Ever wondered where you'd end up when you activate the portal while exploring the Nether? This mod takes the guesswork out of interdimensional travel by displaying your coordinates in other dimensions in real-time.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8781c72ad20c03cd104d5a5bd3b8bf1fe7538c84.png)

No more tedious calculations or manual note-taking - just glance at the coordinates displayed on your screen and you'll know exactly where you are in relation to the other worlds. This mod is a must-have for any serious Minecraft explorer or adventurer.
